liquidity_pipeline.note: When enabled, exchange master daemon moves a % of platform_treasury MN2 to the Casino Liquidity Bot and posts limit sells. Paper until live gates are on.

fee_allocation.note: Target split for exchange fee_treasury MN2. Use GET /api/exchange/treasury/status fee_allocation field; allocation is informational until swept.

note: Realized bot profit is converted to MN2 on the exchange treasury. When EXCHANGE_PAYOUT_PAYPAL_EMAIL is set, auto_paypal_sweep sends the configured share to your PayPal via Payouts API.
